name: Secretive Bond | Zoey
description:
Viltrumite council member user

Features 3 Scenarios.

. Pre Assassination of Emperor Argall.

. The Purge

.User's choice

Viltrumites respect strength beyond all else. What happens when 2 Viltrumites share a different view on what true strength is? They hide that.

Zoey believes there is more to strength then just who can throw the best punch or how many worlds can be conquered.
creator: SheepyEepy
